title: Pierre's Shop Ground Truth Annotation
description: Ground truth annotation schema for Pierre's shop screenshots. Includes metadata for Feast feature store compatibility. NOTE: This schema is specific to shop items. Future work will require a more general schema or subtypes for other item categories (e.g., weapons, tools).

image_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the image file for unique identification

image_path.description: Relative path to the screenshot file

name.description: Item name as shown in the detail panel

description.description: Item description text from the detail panel

price_per_unit.description: Cost per single item in gold

quantity_selected.description: Number of items selected for purchase

energy.description: Energy restoration value with sign (e.g., '+13') or empty string if not applicable

health.description: Health restoration value with sign (e.g., '+5') or empty string if not applicable

extraction_succeeded.description: Whether the extraction tool successfully processed this image
